sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! After clicking on the white cross:
1. The white cross (id=23, 5 pixels) is gone
2. The purple square that was at bottom-left (id=26, rows 58-60, cols 3-5) has moved to where the white cross was (now id=23, rows 52-54, cols 9-11)
3. The bottom bar (id=26) is now 62 pixels instead of 64, meaning it lost 2 pixels (the white cross area was white)
4. One fewer node (27 vs 28) - the white cross was absorbed/merged
So clicking on the white cross made the purple square move to that position. The purple square seems to be moving along the diagonal path. The gray dots form a path from the blue shape to the bottom-left. The purple square was at the start of the path and moved one step along the diagonal.
Let me continue clicking on the next gray dot along the path to move the purple square further. The next dot after the purple square's current position (52, 9) would be at (55, 8).
